name: Guilin Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Guilin coverage with a focus on short stays, city-versus-county tradeoffs, and practical scenic planning.
fullBio: The Guilin Editorial Desk maintains guides, place pages, and planning coverage related to Guilin. Its focus is helping readers judge what belongs in Guilin city, what should be saved for Yangshuo, and how to use limited time without flattening the scenic value into rushed transfers.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for scenic pacing, transfer realism, and whether the advice still matches current Guilin trip-planning conditions.
seoTitle: Guilin Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Guilin guides, place pages, and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
